notes: Hand-built eval set. Fill in `expected_products` (product IDs known to have relevant reviews) and `expect_abstain` for questions that should NOT be answerable from the dataset. Use this to measure retrieval precision/recall and abstention behavior, not just 'looks right'.

questions.question: Do customers complain about battery life on tablets?
Is the screen quality good on Kindle devices?
What do people say about customer service response time?
questions.abstain_reason: Dataset is product reviews, not customer service interactions — this should trigger an abstain if not enough evidence exists.

questions.question: How is the build quality of a product that doesn't exist in this dataset, like a 'SuperWidget 9000'?
questions.abstain_reason: Adversarial test — product not in dataset, should abstain rather than hallucinate.
